req.title: Savings goal
req.statement: A customer shall create a savings goal with a target amount and target date; progress shall be computed nightly.

doc.reasoning: R-FIN-021 specifies creation of savings goals with target amount and date, nightly progress computation, and explicit error handling for invalid targets. Test suite covers: (1) happy path with valid goal creation and progress initialization (EP, positive), (2) rejection of zero and negative targets (NEG, BVA, boundary), (3) boundary condition at target=0.01 (BVA, boundary), (4) authenticated state dependency (STC, positive), and (5) idempotency of goal storage. All tests use REST API layer assertions against /goals endpoint with deterministic payloads and minimal external dependencies.

tests.name: test_create_savings_goal_valid_positive_case
actions: Verify goal stored in database via GET /goals/{goal_id}
expected: GET verification returns identical goal state
tests.executable:
def test_create_savings_goal_valid_positive_case(auth_token, base_url):
    import requests
    from datetime import datetime
    payload = {
        "target_amount": 5000.00,
        "target_date": "2025-12-31"
    }
    headers = {"Authorization": f"Bearer {auth_token}"}
    resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/goals", json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 201, f"Expected 201, got {resp.status_code}"
    data = resp.json()
    assert "goal_id" in data
    assert data["target_amount"] == 5000.00
    assert data["progress"] == 0.0
    assert "created_at" in data
    goal_id = data["goal_id"]
    verify = requests.get(f"{base_url}/goals/{goal_id}", headers=headers)
    assert verify.status_code == 200
    assert verify.json()["goal_id"] == goal_id

tests.name: test_create_savings_goal_negative_target_rejected
actions: Capture response status and error message
expected: Response body contains error code indicating invalid target_amount
Error message indicates target must be positive
No goal is created in system

tests.name: test_create_savings_goal_zero_target_rejected
trace: R-FIN-021: Error pathways - 422 when target <= 0 (boundary: target=0)

tests.name: test_create_savings_goal_minimum_valid_boundary
preconditions: Precision support for two decimal places
actions: Capture response status and goal data
trace: R-FIN-021: Boundary condition - minimum valid positive amount

tests.name: test_create_savings_goal_unauthenticated_rejected
trace: R-FIN-021: State transition - unauthenticated cannot trigger goal creation

tests.name: test_create_savings_goal_idempotent_storage
actions: Capture both response goal_ids and states
expected: Second POST returns 201 with distinct goal_id_2
Both goals exist independently in system
Each goal has correct target_amount and progress=0.0
